betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Lunar Cybernetic Armor§f

§aAdvanced cybernetic plating — the prerequisite for the DNT Nano Suit!§f

§bLunar Cybernetic Armor§f is a set of advanced power armor made from §bLunar Plating§f (hbm:plate_armor_lunar). It serves as the base material for crafting the §bDNT Nano Suit§f — the full set of lunar armor is required to craft the DNT set.

§6Components§f:
The full lunar armor set requires crafting each piece using lunar plating and other advanced materials.

§6Purpose§f:
The entire Lunar Cybernetic Armor set is consumed as a crafting ingredient for the §bDNT Nano Suit§f. You cannot skip this step — the DNT suit requires the lunar set as its base.

§6Properties§f:
§b• Good protection against environmental hazards
§b• Powered armor with various bonuses
§b• Required for the single best armor set in the game

§eTip§f: Consider the Lunar Armor an investment — you're building it to upgrade it. Don't get too attached to the individual pieces since they'll be consumed in DNT crafting. Make sure you have enough lunar plating for the full set plus any extras you might want.
